summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Estate Tea e-commerce site. All backend APIs (10/10 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Entry form simplified to name-only input, dual tea options (Hot/Iced) display when location denied, recipe modals with 7 steps and Pro Tip work correctly, product variants and cart functionality operational.
critical_code_review_comments: Weather API uses MOCKED data due to OpenWeatherMap API returning 401 - real API key may be invalid or expired
Razorpay integration is functional but uses test credentials (rzp_test_*)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Entry form with name-only input (no location field), 2) Auto-location runs silently in background, 3) Store shows dual Hot/Iced tea options when location denied (headless browser), 4) Recipe modals open/close correctly with 7 steps and Pro Tip, 5) Product variants (250g/500g) selectable, 6) Add to Cart navigates to checkout, 7) Cart icon navigation works. Weather API is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.Weather API: GET /api/weather returns mock data based on city hash due to OpenWeatherMap API 401 error

features_tested.entry_form_name_only: PASS - Form only shows name input, no location field
features_tested.form_submits_with_name: PASS - Form submits successfully with just a name
features_tested.tea_options_section: PASS - Shows 'Choose Your Preparation' with Hot Tea and Iced Tea cards
features_tested.hot_tea_recipe_modal: PASS - Opens with 7 steps and Pro Tip
features_tested.iced_tea_recipe_modal: PASS - Opens with 7 steps and Pro Tip
features_tested.product_variants: PASS - 250g and 500g variants visible and selectable
features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - Works with variant selection, navigates to checkout
features_tested.cart_navigation: PASS - Cart icon in header navigates to cart page
